case_title: OSWALD MILAN JR VS. CORVERA'S TOWING

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER RE: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILAN JR, OSWALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORVERA, HOWARD N. DBA COVERA'S TOWING $2,532.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,582.00, I CREDIT PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AND THAT OF HIS WITNESS THAT HE HAD A VALID PARKING PASS. DEFENDANT PROVIDED NO EVIDENCE THAT AUTOZONE'S AGENT WAS PRESENT AT THE TIME OF TOW AS REQUIRED BY VC22658(I)(1)(A), AND PROVIDED ONLY HEARSAY THAT AUTOZONE REQUESTED THE TOW. A GENERAL AUTHORIZATION DOES NOT SUFFICE IN THESE CIRCUMSTANCES. SEE VC 22658(I)(1)(E) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED (THIRD PARTY DEFENDANT) HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS - MOTION ORDER ON PETITION CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT (SEP-04-2019 HEARING DATE) RETURNED BY POST OFFICE. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - CORVERA'S TOWING;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
